entities.name: reflection-synthesizer
entities.context: CLI tool that generates synthesis outputs from session data, supports re-synthesis with fresh perspective

entities.name: Decision Memo
entities.context: Structured executive output format, 2-4 pages, crisp and actionable

entities.name: Key Insights
entities.context: Strategic insights output, 5-7 per session with explicit confidence levels

entities.name: Action Items
entities.context: Actionable output format with What/Why/When/Owner structure, 3-6 per session

entities.name: MECE framework
entities.context: Mutually Exclusive, Collectively Exhaustive structuring principle applied to decision memos

entities.name: voice.md
entities.context: Voice and tone guide document specifying warm but direct communication style

relationships.context: Generates decision memos as primary output
Extracts and structures strategic insights from sessions
Generates prioritized action items from sessions
Applies MECE structure for clarity and completeness
Follows voice guidelines for tone (warm but direct)
Insights feed into and support decision memo content
